content.body: Could somebody that has access to the calendar update it?
presuming "14:00 am pacific time" means 14:00, e.g. 2 pm
remember the F5 zoom meeting will need to be updated too
they both currently have the same meeting link, I'm guessing one will need to change?
no, the Zoom meeting links can be used at any time and as many times as you want
